description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named log4cxx-msys2 that runs on push and pull request events. Use a Windows 2022 job with a matrix strategy to test builds and tests with different environments and compilers, including ucrt64-clang, ucrt64-gnu, mingw64-clang, and mingw64-gnu. For each job, set up msys2, check out the repository, configure and build with CMake and Ninja, and run unit tests with ctest.
